--bg-primary.description: The main background color used for the overall application surface.
--bg-primary.usage: Use as the primary container background.

--bg-secondary.description: A secondary background color for grouping elements or providing subtle contrast.
--bg-secondary.usage: Use for secondary sections, sidebars, or nested containers.

--bg-tertiary.description: A tertiary background color for deeper nesting or subtle separation.
--bg-tertiary.usage: Use for deeply nested elements or very subtle contrast.

--content-primary.description: The primary color for text and icons, ensuring maximum readability.
--content-primary.usage: Use for body text, headings, and primary icons.

--content-secondary.description: A secondary color for text and icons with slightly lower prominence.
--content-secondary.usage: Use for subtext, captions, and secondary icons.

--content-key.description: The core brand color used to highlight key interactive elements.
--content-key.usage: Use for primary buttons, active links, and brand-specific highlights.

--border-primary.description: The primary border color for providing clear structure and definition.
--border-primary.usage: Use for main component outlines and separators.

--state-hover-primary.description: Visual feedback color when a user hovers over an interactive element.
--state-hover-primary.usage: Apply to backgrounds or overlays on hover.

--state-focused-primary.description: Indicates that an element has keyboard focus or is currently active.
--state-focused-primary.usage: Apply to focused elements for accessibility.

--state-pressed-primary.description: Visual feedback color when a user clicks or taps an interaction element.

--gradient-content-primary.description: A vibrant gradient used for emphasizing focal points like progress indicators or active cursors.
--gradient-content-primary.usage: Use for small, high-attention elements that define the user's focus.

--gradient-content-loading.description: A dynamic gradient indicating that AI processing or content loading is in progress.
--gradient-content-loading.usage: Apply to elements during generative or retrieval states.

--gradient-background-ai-surface.description: A sophisticated gradient background for AI response areas and result cards.
--gradient-background-ai-surface.usage: Use specifically for containers that display AI-generated insights or interactive results.

ai-stars.description: Represents AI generation or star-rated results.

ai-chat.description: Used for starting a conversation with the AI agent.

bell-outline.description: Standard notification icon shown in the navigation bar.

icons.default: All icons are standardized to a 24x24 pixel grid.
